prestazioni: Engine swap to 1HD-FTE 4.2L turbo-diesel with forged internals (Mahle forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods) and a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) for 350+ hp at 28 psi boost, paired with a PWR radiator and custom intercooler piping by TurboSmart

Full drivetrain reinforcement: ARB RD110 front and rear differentials with 4.88:1 gear ratios, Toyota Racing Development (TRD) 3rd member for the transfer case, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 17100 catalytic converter delete (off-road use only)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins RXF 36 coilovers (8-way adjustable damping, 2.5-inch diameter pistons) and Old Man Emu BP-51 bypass shocks, paired with polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K) and a custom 3-inch lift kit by Dobinsons
estetica: Full widebody conversion using a J70-specific Rocket Bunny V3 kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber hood, and rear diffuser), with custom 3-piece Work Equip 03 wheels (17x9 +25 front, 17x10.5 +15 rear) wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/70R17 front, 315/70R17 rear)

Custom front bumper with a Warn Zeon 12-S winch, ARB twin air compressors, and a Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light bar, paired with a J70-specific rear bumper by TJM with a swing-out tire carrier and dual RotopaX fuel can mounts

Interior overhaul with Recaro SRD seats (900 series, FIA-approved), a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly), and a full digital dash conversion using an Aim Solo 2 DL GPS data logger with a Racepak IQ3 dash display
